changes_made: Renamed k8s_audit_logging_enabled to k8s_audit_logging_configured for clarity
Renamed k8s_networkpolicy_changes_logged to k8s_networkpolicy_audit_logging_enabled for consistency
review_notes: The functions are generally applicable to Kubernetes and align with the control's focus on continuous monitoring. However, minor naming adjustments were made to improve clarity and consistency with existing naming conventions. The changes ensure that the function names are more descriptive and align with the pattern of indicating configuration status.
title: Continuous Monitoring - Establishing the following system-level metrics...
step1_reasoning: The control CA-7-a focuses on continuous monitoring and establishing system-level metrics. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logging is enabled to capture changes within the cluster, including network policies and API server interactions. Additionally, monitoring admission controller activities can provide insights into policy enforcement and changes at the admission level.
